2.0.10.description: Disable self-signed certs on mobile (Node.js rejectUnauthorized unavailable); force setting to false on load

2.0.9.description: iOS/Android mobile support: detect isMobile, skip Electron shell/openPath, skip Node.js http/https path, add mobile notice for non-native files on download-on-demand

2.0.8.description: Add dedicated Post-Quantum Encryption (ML-KEM-768) section to README; revert manifest id for Obsidian continuity

2.0.7.description: Replace all remaining GPG references with PQC across project files

2.0.6.description: Rename plugin from WebDAV GPG Sync to Webdav PQC Sync

2.0.5.description: Add inline -- description to all eslint-disable/enable directives to satisfy eslint-comments/require-description

2.0.4.description: Suppress all no-unsafe-* eslint warnings for kyber, Node.js http, Obsidian API, and process.env; fix require-await; switch to recommendedTypeChecked

2.0.2.description: Fix eslint warnings: remove unnecessary non-null assertion, suppress no-unsafe-* for ml_kem768 calls, cleanup sync.ts and main.ts

2.0.1.description: Fix TypeScript 5.9 type errors in crypto.ts — use explicit Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer> to match BufferSource

2.0.0.description: Switch from RSA 4096 (OpenPGP) to ML-KEM-768 post-quantum encryption. Breaking: removes passphrase, renames privateKey to secretKey, uses base64 key format. Old encrypted data cannot be decrypted with new keys.

1.0.1.description: Add chunked upload for large files (<90MB configurable) to support Nextcloud
